subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! That which thou didst write was noted and understood. The friends of God must [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی ملحوظ گشت و مفهوم گردید دوستان الهی باید
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @importance of prayer
